description: Refraction at an air-glass boundary: horizontal glass slab (n=1.52) between air bands (n=1.00). Light ray enters top surface at 45 deg, refracts toward the normal to ~28 deg inside the glass (45 deg into n=1.52 -> 27.7 deg), exits bottom surface bending away back to 45 deg, laterally offset from the un-deviated dashed ghost line. Dashed normals at entry and exit; angle arcs theta1=45, theta2~28, exit 45. Bottom-center left open for the player's Snell's law formula chip at 7.0s.
